title: camara lucida
intro: Camara lucida, also known as Indian tutsan, is a small, deciduous shrub native to the Western Ghats of India. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to stimulate the appetite, relieve anxiety and insomnia, and act as a diuretic. The health benefits of Camara lucida include its use in treating digestive issues, such as indigestion and nausea, as well as its potential anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. Camara lucida is traditionally used in herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to promote digestion and relieve stress.
